headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Molina Healthcare, Raises Price Target to $159
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Stephen Baxter   maintains Molina Healthcare (NYSE:MOH) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $141 to $159.

headline: Seagate To Rally More Than 19%? Here Are 10 Top Analyst Forecasts For Monday
summary: Wall Street analysts changed their outlook on top companies. Truist Securities, Guggenheim, Benchmark, HC Wainwright, Stifel, B of A Sec, Mizuho updated their ratings and price targets.

headline: Truist Securities Maintains Hold on Molina Healthcare, Raises Price Target to $180
summary: Truist Securities  analyst David Macdonald   maintains Molina Healthcare (NYSE:MOH) with a Hold and raises the price target from $145 to $180.
